SnowReport.Report:
3/17 2:59PM - Overall, an extremely solid recovery today! After this morning’s flash freeze made for some challenging conditions, we were able to open on time with top-to-bottom skiing! Huge shoutout to our operations and grooming teams for putting in the work to get things back on track. Their efforts overnight and throughout the day have set us up for a much improved tomorrow.

For your Wednesday, we’re planning to get down on 60 open trails, with 58 getting some extra attention from the groomers overnight. Snowmaking has already started up to support those efforts, with guns firing on the West Meadows, Janeway Junction, Drifter Link, and Black Bear tonight, while Polar Bear, Upper Spruce, and Lower Spruce will light up throughout the day tomorrow.

For your way up, 9 lifts are scheduled to spin at 9AM, and with winds dying down, no delays are anticipated. The Sun Bowl will reopen tomorrow and lift access will be available via Sunrise Express and Shooting Star. Please note, there is no beginner skiing or riding from the summit. Rest up and I'll ski ya in the morning!

Safety Tip: Remember to stop in a safe place where others can see you.

Looking ahead, this weekend is on fire with HOMESICK taking over the mountain all weekend long. DJ Trevor Andrew will be spinning at 9PM in Grizzly’s for the Welcome Party, and Lunar Laps night skiing will also be available on Friday night. On Saturday, G. Love and DJ Logic presented by IKON Pass and East Street Archives, will be bringing the live music to Grizzly’s. Hope to see you there!

Upcoming Events
March 20-22: HOMESICK
March 20: Lunar Laps - Night Skiing
March 21: Live Music with The Ultimates
March 21: IKON Pass and East Street Archives presents G. Love and DJ Logic
March 28: Annual Pond Skim
April 11-12: GATHER
To see our full list of events and more fun to come this summer, click HERE. And don't forget, we’re offering 50% off lift tickets every Wednesday and Thursday this season. What are you waiting for? Book now!

Starting March 1, jump into Stratton's Ikon Pass Spring Rewards Challenge. The more you scan, the more you win, and we're giving away tons of prizes all month long. You could score summer concert tickets with a night of lodging, a 26/27 Ikon Pass, and even more prizes! Scan your Ikon Pass at Stratton March 1-31 and start stacking the perks. Click here to learn more about the Ikon Pass Holder Spring Rewards Challenge.

Reliable cars are the name of the game; that is why we trust Oliver Subaru and Ford. Made for all seasons and all families, check out Oliver Ford and Oliver Subaru for year-round reliability!

Stay and relish the Green Mountains! Stratton Real Estate is here to help with all your real estate needs. Make your sweet escape a reality.
